changes: Applied HA Official Radio Browser standards for maximum compatibility (Root: CHANNEL/MUSIC)
Fixed playback issue by specifying audio/mpeg mime-type
Restored MediaClass.MUSIC for better browser compatibility
Maximized Media Player compatibility by using standard DIRECTORY/TRACK combinations
Improved Media Browser compatibility by changing root MediaType to PLAYLIST
Removed incorrect media_source platform forwarding in __init__.py
Ensured media_source.py is loaded via standard component discovery
Fixed ImportError for ConfigEntryState by importing from homeassistant.config_entries
Fixed AttributeError by using async_forward_entry_setups instead of deprecated singular version
Fixed Media Browser missing items by correcting MediaType and root identifier
Added explicit media_source platform forwarding in __init__.py
Aligned with working reference project (YouTube Content Search)
Simplified config_flow.py and removed experimental reconfigure step
Fixed 500 Internal Server Error by restoring OptionsFlow __init__
